title: MAC Engineering Company Website
description: A responsive, professional business website for MAC Engineering, designed to showcase services, completed projects and client engagement. Features a dynamic projects section, live stats and integrated contact forms.
features: Fully responsive front-end interface|Dynamic live project counter via PHP & MySQL|Automated email notification system|Secure admin login system|Cross-device compatibility (desktop, tablet, mobile)|Domain hosting & deployment via Namecheap and cPanel

title: FitZone Fitness Center
description: A modern, responsive gym website for fitness enthusiasts. Showcases membership plans, trainer profiles, fitness programs and an easy-to-use contact form.
features: Home page with gym overview and services|Membership plan explorer|Trainer profile section|Fitness programs for all levels|Contact form for inquiries|Fully responsive on mobile and desktop

title: ZooParc Zoological Website
description: A database-driven website for zoo visitors, volunteers and admins. Built with PHP, MySQL and JavaScript for dynamic, role-based functionality.
features: Visitor information and exhibit pages|Volunteer registration and management|Admin dashboard for content control|Dynamic content powered by PHP & MySQL

title: City Nursing Home Management System
description: A Java OOP-based desktop application with a JFrame GUI to automate hospital operations — managing patients, doctors, appointments and billing in one efficient system.
languages: Java OOP, Java Swing (JFrame), File Storage, Apache NetBeans
features: Patient registration and profile management|Doctor and staff records|Appointment scheduling system|Billing with discount calculation|Report generation (patients, payments)|File storage and database integration

title: LuxeVista Mobile App
description: A luxury resort booking and service reservation mobile app built with Android Studio. Guests can book rooms, reserve spa or restaurant services, manage profiles and leave reviews — all in one elegant app.
features: Splash screen with branded onboarding|Secure login and registration with validation|Dashboard with quick-access cards|Room search and booking with filters|Service reservations (Room Service, Spa, Restaurant)|My Reservations list with SQLite storage|Review management after completed bookings|Profile management and booking notifications

title: K-Beauty Online Store
description: A database-driven website for korean fashion lovers. Built with HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL and JavaScript for dynamic, role-based functionality using Pastel Korean aesthetic design, Fully responsive (mobile,desktop), Smooth animations and hover effects, Live search overlay, Quick view modal, Toast notifications, Scroll reveal animations and Mega dropdown navigation
features: Browse products by category, filter, and search|Wishlist — save favorite products|Shopping cart with quantity controls|Coupon code discounts|Checkout with shipping details|Multiple payment methods (COD, Card, Bank Transfer)|Order history and tracking|Product reviews and ratings|User account with profile editing|Secure login/register with password hashing
